arts.ttl: Arne Slot responds to claims Liverpool have key title advantage over Arsenal and Man City
arts.sum: The Premier League leaders, four points clear with a game in hand, are also currently top of the Champions League table after five successive wins and are on the verge of guaranteeing a top-eight place

arts.ttl: Girona vs Liverpool: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Liverpool take on Girona in the Champions League on Tuesday night. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: Liverpool receive major boost ahead of Champions League clash
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot has confirmed that Alisson Becker is fit and ready to face Girona in the Uefa Champions League on Tuesday night. The Brazilian goalkeeper took part in an open training session on Monday and has travelled with the squad to Spain for their sixth game of the league phase. Alisson has been […] The post Liverpool receive major boost ahead of Champions League clash first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Chelsea dressing room's stance on title chances after closing gap on Liverpool
arts.sum: Chelsea's 4-3 win over Tottenham on Sunday moved the Blues into second in the table with four points currently separating them and leaders Liverpool with optimism growing around Stamford Bridge

arts.ttl: Arne Slot confirms ‘outstanding’ Alisson fit to start for Liverpool against Girona
arts.sum: Brazilian goalkeeper has been sidelined since October Liverpool coach keen to avoid Champions League playoff Alisson could make his Liverpool return against Girona in the Champions League at Montilivi on Tuesday night after Arne Slot confirmed that he is ready to start again. The Brazilian goalkeeper has not played since sustaining a hamstring injury against Crystal Palace at the start of October. But he completed training on Monday morning, flew to Spain with the team and the Liverpool head coach suggested that he could start, saying that the difference he makes “speaks for itself”, even though it would be difficult to improve on the performances of his deputy Caoimhín Kelleher over the past two months. Slot also said he would pick as strong a side as possible, even though Liverpool have a five-point cushion in their push to qualify directly for the last 16 of the restructured Champions League. arts.ttl: Bad news for Liverpool as £51m target picks up ‘serious’ injury ahead of January transfer window
Alexis Mac Allister makes Liverpool transfer admission as midfielder reveals which European league he wants to play in
arts.sum: Liverpool midfielder Alexis Mac Allister opens up about his desire to play in La Liga at some stage of his career.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Ryan Gravenberch responds to glowing comparisons with Real Madrid icon
arts.sum: Liverpool's failure to sign a new No.6 in the summer has been barely noticeable thanks to Ryan Gravenberch stepping into the role and flourishing under Arne Slot this season

arts.ttl: Premier League announce TV fixture changes including huge Man Utd and Liverpool games
arts.sum: Manchester United have been selected for three TV matches in February, while Arsenal, Liverpool and Manchester City all have key fixtures being televised that month
